description: VAPI VHP renewal authorization via ioSwarm multi-node quorum. Nodes evaluate consecutive_clean history and recent BLOCK count to produce CERTIFY_RENEW/SKIP_RENEW/HOLD verdicts. Phase 109B: emulator mode (IoSwarmNodeEmulator) until live nodes registered.

vhp_authorization_gate.description: VAPIProtocolLens eligibility check — operator device must be fully eligible before submitting renewal tasks
